results.name: radiate
results.description: Effects that copy spells and abilities targeting a single creature.

results.name: radical highway
results.description: Shadow's first action stage from Sonic Adventure 2, featuring a series of elevated roadways and bridges with a distinctive visual style inspired by the Golden Gate Bridge.

results.name: raid
results.description: Cards that have an upside if you attacked this turn.

results.name: rainbow land
results.description: A land that can net one or more mana of any color.

results.description: Ramirez DePietro, when he was a human.

results.name: rami symbol
results.description: Image includes the insignia of the Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations (RAMI).

results.name: ramp
results.description: Effects that increase available mana for current or later turns.

results.name: rampage
results.description: A creature gets +N/+N for each creature blocking it

results.name: ran
results.description: One of the last remaining dragons in the Fire Nation.

results.name: random card
results.description: Cards that involve bringing up a Magic: The Gathering card at random, either from the entire card pool or with certain specifications

results.name: ransom
results.description: Cards that remove permanents unless a cost is paid.

results.name: rat fink style
results.description: Art inspired by Ed Roth's Hot Rod artworks, such as Rat Fink.

results.description: A Phyrexian plane used to stage the invasion of Dominaria.
